text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's finally the day of Curren Chan's debut. I
imagine she might be nervous, so I ask her how
she's doing, but her response is a bit...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Hm... I need a good "nervous pose."

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: What about this? Yeah, this is good...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
What?! How rude! Do you think I'd lie to get
likes?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Of course I'm nervous. This marks the beginning
of my path forward.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
The beginning of my path to mastering cuteness...
Hehe. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She smiles cutely. She's definitely nervous... or at
least has a strange nervous energy about her.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: I guess it's about time. Here I go...
